igmnerf_hooks.note: IGMNeRF.forward built-in hooks: g is a 1-D continuous scalar (g_dim=1) concatenated at input; physics_id is a discrete index into nn.Embedding (differentiable w.r.t. the table, not w.r.t. a continuous input vector). A DeepSDF-style continuous d-dim z concatenated at input is NOT a built-in IGMNeRF hook; the feedback-latent SIREN auto-decoder (A2) is a NEW module by design, and the renderer imposes NO obstacle since conditioning lives in the field module passed as `mlp`.

gaps: IGMNeRF.forward does not accept a continuous d-dim conditioning vector directly (only g-scalar / physics_id-embedding); continuous-z conditioning must live in the A2 field module (renderer itself is agnostic — verified).
